sections.paragraph:
Original: רעד

Transliteration: râ‛ad

Phonetic: raw-ad'

BDB Definition:

  1. to tremble, quake
    1. (Qal)
      1. to tremble
      2. (earth)quake
    2. (Hiphil) trembling (participle)

Origin: a primitive root, to shudder (more or less violently)

TWOT entry: 2184

Part(s) of speech: Verb
